headline: AI Chips Update - Etched Unveils AI Chip with $1 Billion in Contracts
summary: Etched has emerged from stealth mode, unveiling its working AI chip alongside securing over $1 billion in customer contracts. The company announced the raising of $800 million in funding, highlighting significant support from notable investors and thought leaders in the AI field. Etched has achieved first-pass silicon success and is validating its rack-scale inference systems with clients, aiming to make AI inference significantly faster, cheaper, and more efficient. With production ramping...

headline: What Palantir Technologies (PLTR)'s NVIDIA Sovereign AI and Surf Air Deals Mean For Shareholders
summary: In late June 2026, Palantir Technologies announced a new sovereign AI initiative with NVIDIA to run Nemotron open models on Palantir’s AIP, Foundry, Ontology, and Apollo platforms for U.S. government agencies and critical infrastructure, alongside an expanded Surf Air Mobility partnership to accelerate SurfOS aviation software powered by Palantir. Together, these alliances deepen Palantir’s role at the core of secure, domain-specific AI infrastructure, spanning classified government systems...
